name: The Cambridge Table
description: A community-minded, farm-to-table catering company based in Cambridge. Known for creative seasonal menus, strong vegan and plant-forward options, and a collaborative approach to menu design. Ideal for couples who want a unique, locally sourced dining experience.

service_area.note: We serve Greater Boston and MetroWest. Travel fee of $4/mile beyond 25 miles. We do not travel to Cape Cod or Rhode Island.

serviceware.eco_note: Sustainability is core to our mission. Eco-friendly serviceware is our default for buffet and family style — upgrade to ceramic at no charge for plated. All food waste is composted.

bar_service.note: We offer wine and beer service with food packages. Full cocktail bar available as an add-on. We feature local craft breweries and organic wines.

sweeteners: Free custom menu design consultation with the head chef
Complimentary grazing table for cocktail hour on full-service bookings
Donation to local food bank in the couple's name with every booking
Complimentary dessert bar for midweek weddings

cancellation_policy.6_plus_months: Deposit forfeited minus $100 credit toward future event

deposit_and_cancellation.note: We try to be flexible. If you need to reschedule, we'll work with you.

highlights: best vegan food we've ever had

personality: Community-minded, creative, and genuinely excited about food. The Cambridge Table loves collaborating with couples to build one-of-a-kind menus. They are the most flexible caterer in the area on pricing and are especially enthusiastic about dietary creativity. They see every wedding as a chance to tell a story through food.
